# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Prefer implementing integrations with external services using direct HTTP calls when possible.
- Use HMAC signatures and V2 endpoints for enhanced security and performance.

## Code Style
- Follow specific formatting rules.
- Adhere to naming conventions.

## Project-Specific Rules
- For Shopee integration, prefer using direct HTTP calls with HMAC signatures and V2 endpoints instead of utilizing the JustCSharp.ShopeeOpenSDK.
